title: Red alert for heat wave issued in Maharashtra’s Amravati, Wardha and Chandrapur districts - News On AIR
search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Maharashtra
full_text:
In Maharashtra red alert of heatwave is sounded in Amravati, Wardha and Chandrapur districts of Vidarbha today.
The districts in east Vidarbha Region Brahmpuri, Gadchiroli, Chandrapur & Wardha recorded temperature upto 46 degrees Celsius, while Nagpur saw temperature upto 45 degrees celcius with heat wave grappling these districts yesterday.
The Regional Meteorological Department has also issued an orange alert for Nagpur, Gadchiroli and Akola districts today.
